reviews.review_description: I love this app, it is my favorite in VR. For an artist & animator it’s a dream come true. For the future I would love to see more options, brushes, textures and 3D brushes. If you are and artist you will love it.

reviews.review_title: No talent for art, and I’ve spent hours
reviews.review_description: I don’t have any artistic talent. And I can even tell you why, but I’m having a blast. Well worth the $20.

This app is a breathtaking example of the power of technology to transform something familiar into something magical. Like FaceTime compared to a phone call, Google Maps compared to asking for directions, or taking digital photos vs film. 

Herein you become a god, and painting and drawing become something new, insanely powerful, and infinitely fascinating. 

I’m not even overstating it. It blows me away, still.

If you love art this app is a MUST
It's a whole new immersive experience
Literally my only complaint.
This wonderful app is tons of fun. Great for serious artists and doodlers alike, I highly recommend it, if you enjoy being creative.

reviews.review_title: More than just a drawing tools
reviews.review_description: This isn't just for designer or artist, it's for everyone. It's super relaxing and therapeutic. Definitely a must get
Very intuitive - can get lost for hours...
A great, easy to use but full featured drawing environment
Really great app. It makes art crazy fun and interactive. My kids love it as well. Walking around your art is great and makes it come alive.

Intuitive and Mindblowing.... well worth investing some time on this.
Hopefully updates will provide even more brushes and effects, but the platform is truly magical.
If you’re an artist and you like detail this is the thing you need to make illustrations easy
Excellent tool for Artists,  and People that just want to create something Amazing. Thanks.
What an amazing experience. The developers of this game are something special.

Absolutely amazing software. For an artist, this is an absolutely must buy. I literally spent over 8 hrs just fooling around in my sketchbook and lost track of time. With advancements in resolution and VR I could see this concept blowing peoples minds more then it already has.
This needs to be used for setup of vr museums based on vr artwork. The things you can do here are amazing and worth every penny!
Absolutely Amazing! A must get!

I hoped that i can use not a paper ribbon like brushes but also thick 3D strings kinda brushes too, its a 3d painting app, not a 2d painting app so i guess it should act more like it. Also, erasing is very bad, i wish it would have a brush kind of eraser not an erasing tool that erase the whole stripe i drew. And there r two more things, moving scaling and moving objects r kinda hard to use, i want to be able to move and scale the whole canvas and rotate it too! Not only scale the canvas, and i dont want to SELECT every single stripe i drew so i can scale it, move it and rotate it, simple fix to that enabling layers or objects, in each layer u will be drawing whatever thing u want then u can select the entire layer scale it, move it, rotate it as a whole layer. With that if i draw a bird and a cat, each one of them will be on its own layer and i can mover the bird how ever i want, rescale it and rotate it without affecting the cat and without having to SELECT every single line i drew for the bird
It’s the most incredible thing I’ve ever seen. I just got started with it and already I’m very impressed. Great App!
I still can’t believe how AMAZING is this app...WOW
